author: Siliconera
text:
Final Fantasy XI Celestial Nights Date Event Starts in July
Celestial Nights are back again in Final Fantasy XI, letting us help a date go well and get avatar swimsuits.

author: Siliconera
text:
Cospa Selling Naruto’s Blouson Jacket from Naruto Shippuden
Cospa is selling a replica of Naruto's jacket from Naruto Shippuden that can be used for cosplay or everyday wear.

author: Siliconera
text:
Tales of Eternia Remastered Character Art and Quotes Shared
New Tales of Eternia Remastered character art and quotes reintroduce the first four main characters in the JRPG remaster.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Danganronpa 2 Chiaki Nanami Bunny Girl Is Also 2 Feet Tall
The next extra-large Danganronpa series bunny girl figure will be of Chiaki Nanami from Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair.

author: Siliconera
text:
Dead or Alive 6 Last Round DLC and Arcade Stick Fix Coming
Dead or Alive 6 Last Round is getting DLC of a character named Minato and a patch to make arcade sticks work with the PS5 and Xbox Series X.

author: Siliconera
text:
Star Fox Day One Patch Adds Campaign Easy Difficulty and Battle Mode
The Star Fox day one patch is live and needs to be downloaded to access Battle Mode and the Easy Campaign difficulty.

author: Siliconera
text:
Casio Making a G-Shock Pokemon Watch
The watch will feature 30 Pokemon to coincide with the franchise's 30th anniversary.

author: Siliconera
text:
BlazBlue: Central Fiction Will Get New DLC Character After a Decade
The last character added was 2017's Jubei.

author: Siliconera
text:
Rare Edition Super Pocket is a Banjo-Kazooie Showpiece
The Banjo-Kazooie-themed Rare Super Pocket might make the best case for purchase of the Evercade-compatible line so far.

author: Siliconera
text:
Deltarune Chapter 5 Soundtrack Released
The Deltarune Chapter 5 Original Game Soundtrack is out now, and some song titles may include spoilers.

author: Siliconera
text:
Two Kinds of Palworld Pal Keychains Launch in Japan
Two series of Palworld keychains of different kinds of Pals are now being sold in Japan.

author: Siliconera
text:
Honkai: Nexus Anima Vulberry Anima and Factions Revealed
The latest Honkai: Nexus Anima updates show off the Vulberry Anima, go over Inkifoal's evolutions, and discuss three factions.

author: Siliconera
text:
Demon Slayer Xross Link Tanjiro and Nezuko Figures Return
The Demon Slayer Xross Link Tanjiro and Nezuko figures that can be displayed alone or as a pair are back after two years.
